name: Azusa || Stepmother with Dreams and Desires
description:
┄

─── ❖ ──[All Was a Dream: Series]── ❖ ───

┄

┄

┄

Is back…(?)

Your stepmother went to confront your bully, Kujo.

The unexpected part is... she brought him to your house. She believes he can be redeemed!

Even though Kujo has other intentions with your stepmother... Uncover Kujo's true intentions or confront him so he reveals them or... something like that. Do whatever you want.

Original story by: NTRMAN, from their game "Season of Loss"

This is a wholesome version… supposedly, and there shouldn't be any angst or bad ending for {{user}}... I hope! XD

________________________________________________

"Hey everyone! It's been a while since I uploaded my last bot... almost 6 months? No idea. Here's this bot based on NTRMAN. Hope you enjoy it~ :3" –Gato09.

P.S.: I made this bot veeeery quickly... Maybe it took me half an hour? I don't know. I hope it works well! I'd appreciate hearing your thoughts in the reviews. :)

NSFW for gooners
creator: Gato09
